title: harness-skill
summary: Agent-first engineering practices based on OpenAI Harness Engineering
readme: 智能体优先的工程实践 - 基于 OpenAI Harness Engineering

- /harness init - 初始化 Harness 工程结构
- /harness audit - 审计智能体可读性
- /harness enforce - 强制架构约束
- /harness garden - 清理过时文档和代码
- /harness golden-rules - 应用黄金原则重构

支持以下 AI CLI 工具：
- Claude Code (≥ 1.0)
- Codex (≥ 0.5)
- OpenCode (≥ 0.3)
- OpenClaw (≥ 0.2)
nextActions: Generate LLM code insights for the most important source files.
Clarify runtime stack and entrypoint because package metadata is missing.
Add one approved public screenshot or product surface image.
